overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character exploring a neon-lit, rain-slicked commercial street in Night City. The character walks past futuristic storefronts, vending machines, and NCPD officers by their parked vehicle in a dense urban canyon of holographic advertisements and reflective wet pavement.

scene_state.functional_zone: upscale outdoor seating area with illuminated furniture

events.description: character stands up from the outdoor seating table
moves away from the covered seating area into the open walkway

agents.ego_description: character stands up from the table and begins walking along the building facade with reflective wet pavement

entered.detail: round illuminated table with glowing cyan surface and metallic base
modern curved seating with glowing green base lighting
tall palm tree with illuminated trunk in circular metal planter
modern building with horizontal red stripes and reflective glass

segments.scene_description: The segment begins with the character seated at an illuminated outdoor table in a covered seating area. The character stands up and walks forward along a wet, reflective pavement lined with palm trees. The area features modern black leather chairs with glowing bases and overlooks a glass building facade with horizontal red stripes.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial pedestrian walkway with digital advertisements

events.description: passing illuminated vending machines with bright advertisements
approaching parked NCPD police vehicle on the left side of the walkway

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet pavement past storefronts and vending machines

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking away from camera along the building facade

entered.detail: pair of illuminated vending machines with 'ENJOY' and 'NCOLA' branding
large screen displaying animated advertisements with pink neon graphics
futuristic black police SUV with glowing blue 'NCPD' text on the side

segments.scene_description: The character walks along the open pedestrian street, passing illuminated vending machines on the right. The wet pavement reflects the neon lights from towering digital billboards. A parked NCPD police vehicle becomes visible ahead on the left, positioned near the building entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: police checkpoint area on main commercial street

events.description: walking past the parked NCPD vehicle and standing officers
slight turn to navigate around pedestrians on the walkway

agents.ego_description: walking past the police officers and continuing down the commercial street

notable_agents.action: NCPD officer standing guard next to the police vehicle
second officer leaning against the vehicle

entered.detail: small brown food stand with illuminated menu display and metal security grating
tall spiral building with horizontal green neon lighting bands

segments.scene_description: The character passes the parked NCPD vehicle where two officers stand guard. The street opens up to reveal a distinctive spiral building with green neon bands in the distance. A brown food kiosk appears on the right as the character navigates through moderate pedestrian traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow commercial alley with food vendors and outdoor dining

events.description: entering dense area with outdoor dining tables and food kiosks
passing close to pedestrians on the narrow pathway

agents.ego_description: navigating through pedestrians and past outdoor dining areas along the narrow commercial street

notable_agents.action: person with bright pink hair standing at food kiosk counter
person sitting at outdoor table eating

entered.detail: yellow and teal food stand with mesh security screen and illuminated signage
metal tables and chairs along the building facade where NPCs are seated
towering vertical holographic advertisements lining the street ahead

segments.scene_description: The street narrows into a dense commercial alley lined with food kiosks and outdoor dining. The character passes a yellow food stand on the right where a person with pink hair stands at the counter. Pedestrians occupy the tables and walkway as towering vertical neon billboards illuminate the path ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a quiet, illuminated seating area into the dense, neon-saturated commercial heart of a futuristic city. It begins with the character rising from a glowing outdoor table and walking across reflective wet pavement lined with palm trees and a striped glass facade. As the character moves forward, the space opens into a pedestrian street where the ground mirrors towering digital billboards and illuminated vending machines before approaching a parked NCPD vehicle and its guarding officers. The scene then expands to reveal a distant spiral building with green neon bands and a brown food kiosk amidst moderate pedestrian traffic. Finally, the path narrows into a crowded commercial alley filled with outdoor dining and yellow food stands, where vertical neon billboards cast a vibrant glow over the bustling walkway.
